summary.sosovalue: On April 18, 2026, SoSoValue generated strong positive sentiment through community discussions on Season 2 airdrop farming, with users claiming daily EXP, optimizing real-user probability via tasks like check-ins, SoDEX trading, and X engagement to boost allocations beyond mere EXP counts. The launch of a Buildathon offering 10,000 USDC in prizes for building on their AI-powered infrastructure—including news, data, indexes, trading APIs, and SoDEX—sparked excitement among solo developers aiming to create on-chain finance businesses. Users expressed optimism about upcoming snapshots and rewards, emphasizing consistency as key to success, while data reports on ETF flows further highlighted the platform's utility.
summary.sodex: SoDEX buzzed with anticipation on April 18 following the announcement of a v3 mainnet upgrade on April 20, promising enhanced stability and scalability for high-volume trading. Farmers actively traded spot and perps to accumulate SoPoints and volumes, tying into SoSoValue airdrop eligibility, with strategies focusing on avoiding liquidations during maintenance. Sentiment remains bullish as users view the upgrade and point farming as pathways to substantial rewards.
